title: DealerInformationResponse
description: Typed AAP response for the `dealer.information` skill. Wraps a DealerInformation object inside the standard AAP response envelope (`{ type, data, message? }`). Carried inside an A2A `Message.parts[].data` DataPart returned from the `SendMessage` operation.

message.description: Optional contextual note from the dealer or LLM. MAY be omitted.
